Off Calendar May-25-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF JOHN DOE'S Motion For 1) An Order Sealing Certificates Of Merit And Certificate Of Corroborative Fact (By Attorney); 2) An In Camera Review And Finding Of Reasonable And Meritorious Cause For Filing Of Action And That Plaintiff
